versions.name: After Effects
versions.virusTested: App passed the virus check. (Tested on Personal Device).
versions.installGuide: Extract the ZIP file (Pass is inside the app). Mount ISO from ZIP. Turn off internet & antivirus. Add Setup.exe and packages/products/resources folders as exclusions in antivirus. Run Setup.exe.
